name: Code
description: CSS-only inline code styles. Apply class="sg-code" on a native <code>.
whenToUse: Displaying inline code, variable names, file paths, or short highlighted snippets within text.
avoidWhen: Keyboard shortcuts (use Kbd). Multi-line code blocks (use CodeBlock).

class.description: Use class="sg-code" on a native <code> element.

data-color.description: Color variant for the inline code.

route.label: Code
route.description: Inline code element for variable names and snippets

examples.title: Inline Code
examples.code: Use the console.log() function to debug. Set the NODE_ENV variable before running.

examples.title: Color Variants
examples.code: default primary muted

examples.title: In Prose
examples.code: Install dependencies with bun install, then run bun dev to start the server. Configuration lives in sigui.config.ts.
